triage_rows.detail: When board-level lockout is active, seed-level reentry ladder should remain subordinate. suggested_min_cooldown_trading_days = 60.
Lockout remains supervision-only and does not reopen replay or authorize live binding.

interpretation: V1.34BF converts the new board-level cooling audit into the next direction judgment.
The lockout seed may sit above seed-level reentry supervision, but it remains governance-only and does not authorize execution binding.
